title: How Agentforce Commerce and Google UCP power the future of agentic shopping
author: More by Eric

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Businesses that adjust quickly to new technology and behaviors typically find the most success. Consider the rise of mobile andsocial commercein the early aughts, and the proliferation of contactless payment and curbside pickup during the pandemic. Brands that were able to move at the speed of consumer behavior found a competitive edge as the tides of shopping shifted. Today, we’re witnessing the next great shift: the rise of LLMs and protocol-based commerce. Customers are no longer confined to ecommerce sites or retail apps to browse and discover products. Now, discovery — and even conversion — can happen in real-time chats and AI-driven search results. The key to earn share of voice and share of wallet on these emerging channels?Universal Commerce Protocol(UCP) Agentforce Commercerecently announced its integration withGoogle’s Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP).This will empower merchants to stay ahead of the curve as the market shifts to agentic commerce. Here’s everything you need to know about Agentforce Commerce and UCP.

sections.heading: What is UCP and why is it important right now?
sections.text: At its core, Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) is a standardized framework to streamline how product data and transaction capabilities are shared across the web. You can think of it as a “common language” for commerce. In the past, if a merchant wanted to make their products purchasable on a new platform, they would likely need to build custom integrations or manage fragmented feeds. This new Agentforce Commerce integration with UCP makes it possible to sell on emerging LLM-driven channels (like Google’s Gemini) without the large investment in time and resources from your development teams. The rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) andAI agentsis already changing the way people shop. During the 2025 holiday season, traffic from AI-driven search engines converted9 times higherthan traffic from social media. AI shopping agents make it possible for consumers to search for hyper-specific products and find tailored results in an instant. Consumers are increasingly asking AI assistants to “find me a waterproof hiking boot under $150” rather than typing a single word into a search bar and scrolling through pages of results. Without a protocol like UCP, AI agents struggle to surface your products and verify real-time inventory, pricing, or shipping options. UCP solves this by: Providing a single source of truth for product data that any AI agent can understand.Enabling headless transactions, allowing customers to buy products directly within the interface where they discovered them.Reducing friction in the path to purchase, meeting the customer exactly where their intent is highest.

sections.heading: Agentforce Commerce is a platform built for the agentic future
sections.text: For brands using Agentforce Commerce, the integration with UCP isn’t just a technical update; it’s a massive expansion of their digital storefront. The primary benefits include: Unprecedented Reach:Your products become discoverable and shoppable across the entire Google ecosystem and any third-party AI agents utilizing the protocol — without a giant push from your development teams.Future-Proofing:As agentic commerce grows, merchants don’t have to worry about building new tools for every emerging AI platform. The UCP integration ensures you are compatible with the future of the web by default.Higher Conversion Rates:By enabling a seamless checkout experience within the AI interaction (rather than forcing a redirect to your website), you eliminate the drop-off points that typically plague mobile and social shopping.Data-Driven Accuracy:Agentforce ensures that the data fed into UCP is always current. This prevents AI from suggesting a product that is actually out of stock or incorrectly priced.

sections.heading: One platform, infinite flexibility
sections.text: Instead of managing expensive third-party integrations or attempting to build these complex bridges yourself, Salesforce ensures that if it’s built on our platform, it’s ready for the world. Agentforce Commerce treats AI-driven protocols like Google UCP as high-performance extensions of your existing architecture. You can now reach shoppers on Google’s AI surfaces using the same simple merchant experience that powers your flagship site today, ensuring that as you expand into agentic commerce, your operations remain straightforward and your total cost of ownership stays low.

sections.heading: Future-proof your business with Agentforce and Google UCP
sections.text: The next decade of commerce isn’t just about being everywhere; it’s about building your brand intelligently with the shopper at the center. This is made possible by the powerful combination of Agentforce and Google UCP, unified by the Salesforce platform. Agentforce helps you deliver personalized, brand-aligned shopping experiences that build lasting loyalty — grounded in your unique customer data and business logic to ensure every interaction feels like a premium concierge service on your own digital properties. Simultaneously, the integration with Google UCP provides the ultimate extensibility, acting as a bridge to acquire shoppers at the moment of discovery within the Google ecosystem. With a unified, agentic commerce platform as the facilitator, this architecture ensures you aren’t managing disconnected strategies; instead, your personalization and acquisition engines work together on a common, trusted foundation built for scale.

sections.heading: What this new integration means for your business
sections.text: Salesforce provides the bridge between your brand and the future of AI-driven shopping. We are ensuring our customers can move fast, stay agile, and reach their shoppers wherever they are. Through consistent innovation, our goal is to ensure that your business enjoys a lower total cost of ownership, higher return on investment, faster time to value, and overall success in the future of commerce.

raw_html:
Businesses that adjust quickly to new technology and behaviors typically find the most success. Consider the rise of mobile and social commerce in the early aughts, and the proliferation of contactless payment and curbside pickup during the pandemic. Brands that were able to move at the speed of consumer behavior found a competitive edge as the tides of shopping shifted.

Today, we’re witnessing the next great shift: the rise of LLMs and protocol-based commerce.

Customers are no longer confined to ecommerce sites or retail apps to browse and discover products. Now, discovery — and even conversion — can happen in real-time chats and AI-driven search results. The key to earn share of voice and share of wallet on these emerging channels? Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) 

Agentforce Commerce recently announced its integration with Google’s Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). This will empower merchants to stay ahead of the curve as the market shifts to agentic commerce. Here’s everything you need to know about Agentforce Commerce and UCP.

What is UCP and why is it important right now?

At its core, Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) is a standardized framework to streamline how product data and transaction capabilities are shared across the web. You can think of it as a “common language” for commerce. In the past, if a merchant wanted to make their products purchasable on a new platform, they would likely need to build custom integrations or manage fragmented feeds. This new Agentforce Commerce integration with UCP makes it possible to sell on emerging LLM-driven channels (like Google’s Gemini) without the large investment in time and resources from your development teams.

The rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents is already changing the way people shop. During the 2025 holiday season, traffic from AI-driven search engines converted 9 times higher than traffic from social media. AI shopping agents make it possible for consumers to search for hyper-specific products and find tailored results in an instant. Consumers are increasingly asking AI assistants to “find me a waterproof hiking boot under $150” rather than typing a single word into a search bar and scrolling through pages of results.

Without a protocol like UCP, AI agents struggle to surface your products and verify real-time inventory, pricing, or shipping options. UCP solves this by:

  • Providing a single source of truth for product data that any AI agent can understand.
  • Enabling headless transactions, allowing customers to buy products directly within the interface where they discovered them.
  • Reducing friction in the path to purchase, meeting the customer exactly where their intent is highest.

Agentforce Commerce is a platform built for the agentic future

For brands using Agentforce Commerce, the integration with UCP isn’t just a technical update; it’s a massive expansion of their digital storefront. The primary benefits include:

  • Unprecedented Reach: Your products become discoverable and shoppable across the entire Google ecosystem and any third-party AI agents utilizing the protocol — without a giant push from your development teams.
  • Future-Proofing: As agentic commerce grows, merchants don’t have to worry about building new tools for every emerging AI platform. The UCP integration ensures you are compatible with the future of the web by default.
  • Higher Conversion Rates: By enabling a seamless checkout experience within the AI interaction (rather than forcing a redirect to your website), you eliminate the drop-off points that typically plague mobile and social shopping.
  • Data-Driven Accuracy: Agentforce ensures that the data fed into UCP is always current. This prevents AI from suggesting a product that is actually out of stock or incorrectly priced.

One platform, infinite flexibility

Instead of managing expensive third-party integrations or attempting to build these complex bridges yourself, Salesforce ensures that if it’s built on our platform, it’s ready for the world. Agentforce Commerce treats AI-driven protocols like Google UCP as high-performance extensions of your existing architecture. You can now reach shoppers on Google’s AI surfaces using the same simple merchant experience that powers your flagship site today, ensuring that as you expand into agentic commerce, your operations remain straightforward and your total cost of ownership stays low.

Future-proof your business with Agentforce and Google UCP

The next decade of commerce isn’t just about being everywhere; it’s about building your brand intelligently with the shopper at the center. This is made possible by the powerful combination of Agentforce and Google UCP, unified by the Salesforce platform. 

Agentforce helps you deliver personalized, brand-aligned shopping experiences that build lasting loyalty — grounded in your unique customer data and business logic to ensure every interaction feels like a premium concierge service on your own digital properties. Simultaneously, the integration with Google UCP provides the ultimate extensibility, acting as a bridge to acquire shoppers at the moment of discovery within the Google ecosystem. With a unified, agentic commerce platform as the facilitator, this architecture ensures you aren’t managing disconnected strategies; instead, your personalization and acquisition engines work together on a common, trusted foundation built for scale.

What this new integration means for your business 

Salesforce provides the bridge between your brand and the future of AI-driven shopping. We are ensuring our customers can move fast, stay agile, and reach their shoppers wherever they are. Through consistent innovation, our goal is to ensure that your business enjoys a lower total cost of ownership, higher return on investment, faster time to value, and overall success in the future of commerce.
